generated_oml:
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data ingestion and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "digital twin instance management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, InfrastructureOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "photorealistic 3D visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance BIM : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "static asset representation and spatial data integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables InfrastructureOptimizationService
]

instance BuildingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor monitoring building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingOperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingOperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingSensor
]

instance BuildingOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingOperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMDeviceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based device modeling of sensors, actuators, and controllers with a unified semantic foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIM
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for system states and infrastructure control"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateMonitoringInsight, InfrastructureControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting building system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastingInsight
]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Infrastructure optimization services for reduced operational costs and enhanced decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SystemStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of system states for Facility Managers"
]

instance ForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting building system performance"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Infrastructure optimization insights for operational cost reduction"
]

instance InfrastructureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual control of physical infrastructure by Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Architecture, Engineering, Construction and Operations domain for building infrastructure"
    base:contains BuildingSensor, BIMDeviceModel, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine, BIM, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling integration of custom services and analytics; DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, with roles including Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for real-time monitoring and control, and DT Engineers for service integration to support holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle includes initial device modeling using BIM for static representation, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation into structured semantic representations, automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts, real-time data synchronization between physical and digital systems, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular extension through custom services. Governance is managed via role-specific responsibilities: Building Control Engineers model devices and configure control logic, Facility Managers monitor system states and operate infrastructure, and DT Engineers develop custom services."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The framework includes model validation processes specified in Section IV and utilizes the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess the accuracy of the digital twin's representation of its physical counterpart."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Nonfunctional requirements (NF_X) address interoperability across heterogeneous systems via standardized extension points for service integration; specific data exchange protocols or standards are not detailed in the document."
]
